title: OpenGL Concepts & Setup
description: Understand the OpenGL graphics API, state machine architecture, context creation, and shader loading.
learningObjectives: Explain the OpenGL state-machine architecture paradigm
Configure OpenGL rendering contexts and handle buffer swaps
Upload vertex and index arrays to GPU memory buffers

sections.title: State Machines and Contexts
sections.content: OpenGL is a cross-language, cross-platform graphics API. It is structured as a state machine: you bind shader contexts, configure test states (like enabling depth testing), and then submit draw commands. Data is uploaded to the GPU using Vertex Buffer Objects (VBO) and indexed using Element Buffer Objects (EBO) to prevent redundant vertex memory duplication.

sections.title: Uploading Vertex Buffers in OpenGL
